message:
test(query): add joined-table inheritance SELECT integration tests

Add JoinedParent and JoinedEmployee test models to verify:
- SELECT queries emit INNER JOIN to parent table on matching PKs
- Both child and parent columns are projected with table__col aliases
- WHERE clause, ORDER BY, and LIMIT work correctly with the join
- EXISTS subquery includes the parent join for correct filtering

Also applies rustfmt formatting to joined_inheritance_parent(),
joined_inheritance_join(), and eager-loading column collection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
